name: Murder Room
overview: In the near future, the justice system as you know it is no more. No courtrooms, no attorneys. Aided only by an interactive crime-solving network known as “Jessica” and led by The Foreman, a council of four humans will have just 30 minutes to examine a murder case, then hand an immediate death sentence to one of three suspects.

trailers.title: Welcome to a New Age of Law | Rooster Teeth Trailers
